name: ironSource Mobile Growth Platform API
what_it_does: Mobile growth platform with REST API — combining user acquisition advertising, in-app monetization mediation (LevelPlay), and analytics for mobile app and game publishers, now part of Unity Technologies after merger, offering rewarded advertising, interstitials, offerwall, and programmatic buying with ML optimization.
use_cases: Managing mobile user acquisition campaigns across ironSource network via API
Configuring LevelPlay (formerly ironSource Mediation) waterfall settings programmatically
Pulling campaign and monetization performance data for mobile growth analytics
Integrating ironSource with MMP for cross-channel attribution and cohort analysis
Managing offerwall placements and reward configurations via REST API
not_for: B2B or enterprise software advertising (targets mobile consumer app and game audiences)
Small developers without meaningful DAU — mediation ROI requires traffic volume
best_when: A mobile game publisher already using Unity game engine needs integrated user acquisition and in-app monetization from a single vendor — especially for rewarded video and offerwall ad formats.
avoid_when: You don't use Unity for development, primarily build subscription apps (vs ad-supported), or need cross-channel advertising beyond mobile gaming.

auth.notes: API key from ironSource/Unity dashboard. Bearer token auth. Account-scoped access. Webhook for user acquisition events and ad revenue postbacks. LevelPlay SDK for in-app mediation. Unity integration for game development. MMP integration for attribution. No OAuth2. API key separate from SDK app key.

pricing.free_tier_limits: LevelPlay mediation free; UA campaigns pay per performance
pricing.paid_tiers: CPI/ROAS-based pricing for UA; mediation is revenue share
pricing.notes: Israeli company (Tel Aviv). Founded 2010. NYSE listed (IS). Merged with Unity Technologies 2022 for $4.4B combined. Now operates as Unity Grow division. Combined Unity + ironSource = dominant mobile game UA + monetization ecosystem. LevelPlay (formerly ironSource Mediation) competes with AppLovin MAX. Offerwall is unique differentiator — task-based rewards. 100,000+ apps using LevelPlay. Significant consolidation in mobile ad tech ecosystem.

agent_readiness.error_message_notes: REST API for UA campaigns, LevelPlay mediation, and reporting. API key auth. Good developer documentation. Unity merger creating documentation migration — some docs still under ironSource branding. SDK required for in-app ad serving (separate from REST API). MMP integration for attribution postbacks. Webhook for conversion events.
agent_readiness.idempotency_notes: Report reads idempotent. Campaign reads idempotent. Mediation configuration updates may not be fully idempotent.
known_agent_gotchas: Unity merger (2022) creating platform migration — some features transitioning to Unity dashboard
LevelPlay mediation requires SDK per ad network — complex waterfall configuration
Israeli company — EU and US data residency available; verify data transfer mechanisms
COPPA: offerwall and rewarded ads require child-safe mode for apps targeting minors
ironSource and Unity Ads are now unified but documentation is transitional

security_score_components.security_notes: TLS enforced. GDPR, CCPA, COPPA compliant. US, EU, IL data residency. API key auth. Israeli company — data transfer mechanisms for EU require Standard Contractual Clauses. Mobile device data (IDFA, GAID) subject to ATT and GDPR requirements. Offerwall user data and completion events require privacy-safe handling. COPPA: no behavioral targeting for children's apps.
